DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Daniel Devoy (415-615-0879) appearing for Defendant and moving party/ No other apperances.

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DAVID WOODS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Overruled. Cross-complainants sufficiently alleged the terms of breached agreement. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Cross-Defendant Woods' Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege amount of damages sough in compliance with CCP 425.10. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Set One Of Deft'S Form Interrogatories Nos 2.3, 2.5, 2.13, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Pltf'S Attorney, James Coy Driscoll For $2,582
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Jones, Esq. (415-615-0879)for Bruce Deluna, defendant and moving party / William Bard, (510-303-6970) specially appearing for David Michael Woods, plaintiff and opposing party

At 9:00am, counsel meet and confer per tentative ruling. At 9:42am, counsel reports that there are no resolutions reached during the meet and confer in open court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANT BRUCE DELUNA and CHARLENE DELUNA's Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Set One Of Defendant'S Form Interrogatories Nos 2.3, 2.5, 2.13, is granted in part and denied in part. Request for sanctions is denied. Moving party is ordered to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar May-02-2013 Continued To Jul-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Alexander T. Jones of Jones & Devoy LLP (415-615-0879) appear for defendant Bruce C. Deluna opposing party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DAVID WOODS' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled - General and special demurrer to answer not unintelligible and demurrer is without merit.
